The '''Induparan Monarchy''' was headed by [[House Indupar]] and governed both [[Indupar/Legends|Indupar]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], as well as the [[Induparan Crown Worlds]]. [[Dahon Indupar]] was [[King/Legends|King]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
